metadata.note: V-T5 pact: the ranking re-rank contract (POST /v1/rank) served by the ranking service. File-based broker (see contracts/pacts/customer-bff__placeholder.json): registryctl pact-verify REPLAYS each interaction against the REAL ranking service booted by ci/pact-verify.sh (ranking_ml on). The interaction posts two candidates with DIFFERENT ratings and NO popularity features, so on a fresh feature store the ML score is rating-dominant and the higher-rated store ranks first — deterministic without any provider state. Pinned: results[0].store_id, scorer, count. Feature-derived re-orderings (popularity/CTR) are NOT pinned.

interactions.description: re-rank a candidate set returns the top stores with a scorer label
